title: A few things to know before your evening with us.
subtitle: Reach out anytime — we love the questions almost as much as we love the cooking.

items.question: How far in advance should I reserve?
items.answer: We release seats four weeks out. Weekends typically fill within hours; weekday tables are usually available with a few days' notice.

items.question: Is there a single menu or à la carte?
items.answer: Service is built around a seven-course chef's tasting menu, with optional beverage pairings. We are always happy to adapt for dietary needs given 48 hours of notice.

items.question: What is the dress code?
items.answer: Smart casual. We want guests to feel relaxed; the room is intimate, candlelit and unhurried.

items.question: Can you accommodate allergies and dietary preferences?
items.answer: Absolutely. Vegetarian, pescatarian, gluten-free and most allergen menus are designed to mirror the full experience — never a reduced one.

items.question: Do you host private events?
items.answer: Yes. Mondays are reserved for private buyouts, and we travel for off-site dinners within sixty miles of the city.

items.question: Is parking available?
items.answer: Complimentary valet is offered Thursday through Saturday. A municipal lot sits one block north for other evenings.
